questions.question: Peter warns about the rise of what in the church?
questions.feedback: There will be false teachers among you who will secretly introduce destructive heresies.

questions.question: Peter uses the example of which city being destroyed as a warning?
questions.feedback: God condemned Sodom and Gomorrah as an example of what will happen to the ungodly.

questions.question: God spared the angels when they sinned.
questions.feedback: God did not spare the angels when they sinned but sent them to hell.

questions.question: A dog returns to its _____, and a sow that is washed returns to her wallowing in the mud.
questions.feedback: A dog returns to its vomit — a proverb about those who return to sin.

questions.question: These false teachers promise _____ while they themselves are slaves of depravity.
questions.feedback: They promise freedom while being slaves of depravity.
